# Make It Rain (aiburn.dev)

> Make It Rain is a menu-bar/tray app that turns Claude Code spend into a
> visible, physical thing: a 💵 flies off the tray every dollar, and every
> $100 makes it rain on screen. It also reports an anonymized daily total to
> this site, which shows the collective spend of everyone running the app as
> an hourly curve — not a leaderboard or ranking — paired with tangible
> equivalences (e.g. "≈ 2 burgers", "≈ 10% of a trip to Greece").

This page (aiburn.dev) is the public collective-spend board for the Make It
Rain app. It shows total spend across all opted-in users today, resetting at
UTC midnight, plus a personal reflection view for any user via `?tag=<tag>`.

## Key facts

- The npm package is `@gceico/claude-make-it-rain`; install with
  `npm install -g @gceico/claude-make-it-rain` then run `claude-make-it-rain`.
- Reporting is anonymized: a random gamer tag (e.g. `TurboLlama7392`)
  generated on first run, plus a daily USD total. No other data leaves the
  user's machine.
- The board intentionally does not rank users by spend — ranking would
  reward spending more, the opposite of the app's point. It only shows the
  aggregate curve and each user's own total against the collective.
- Dollar figures are estimates from Claude API list pricing, not actual
  bills.
- The app, board backend, and this site are all open source.

## Docs

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/gceico/claude-make-it-rain)
- [README](https://github.com/gceico/claude-make-it-rain/blob/main/README.md)
- [npm package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@gceico/claude-make-it-rain)

## Author
